endpoints.name: List budgets
endpoints.description: Returns budgets list with summary information
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY.

endpoints.name: Single budget
endpoints.description: Returns a single budget with all related entities.  This resource is effectively a full budget export.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Account list
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Create a new account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Single account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List account transactions
endpoints.description: Returns all transactions for a specified account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List categories
endpoints.description: Returns all categories grouped by category group.  Amounts (budgeted, activity, balance, etc.) are specific to the current budget month (UTC).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Single category
endpoints.description: Returns a single category.  Amounts (budgeted, activity, balance, etc.) are specific to the current budget month (UTC).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{CATEGORY_ID}} with a real category_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List category transactions
endpoints.description: Returns all transactions for a specified category
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{CATEGORY_ID}} with a real category_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List budget months
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Single budget month
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{MONTH}} with a real month. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Single category for a specific budget month
endpoints.description: Returns a single category for a specific budget month.  Amounts (budgeted, activity, balance, etc.) are specific to the current budget month (UTC).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{CATEGORY_ID}} with a real category_id. Replace {{MONTH}} with a real month. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Update a category for a specific month
endpoints.description: Update a category for a specific month.  Only `budgeted` amount can be updated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{CATEGORY_ID}} with a real category_id. Replace {{MONTH}} with a real month. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List payee locations
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Single payee location
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{PAYEE_LOCATION_ID}} with a real payee_location_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List payees
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Single payee
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{PAYEE_ID}} with a real payee_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List locations for a payee
endpoints.description: Returns all payee locations for a specified payee
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{PAYEE_ID}} with a real payee_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List payee transactions
endpoints.description: Returns all transactions for a specified payee
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{PAYEE_ID}} with a real payee_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List scheduled transactions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Single scheduled transaction
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{SCHEDULED_TRANSACTION_ID}} with a real scheduled_transaction_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Budget Settings
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: List transactions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Create a single transaction or multiple transactions
endpoints.description: Creates a single transaction or multiple transactions.  If you provide a body containing a `transaction` object, a single transaction will be created and if you provide a body containing a `transactions` array, multiple transactions will be created.  Scheduled transactions cannot be created on this endpoint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Update multiple transactions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Bulk create transactions
endpoints.description: Creates multiple transactions.  Although this endpoint is still supported, it is recommended to use 'POST /budgets/{budget_id}/transactions' to create multiple transactions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Import transactions
endpoints.description: Imports available transactions on all linked accounts for the given budget.  Linked accounts allow transactions to be imported directly from a specified financial institution and this endpoint initiates that import.  Sending a request to this endpoint is the equivalent of clicking "Import" on each account in the web application or tapping the "New Transactions" banner in the mobile applications.  The response for this endpoint contains the transaction ids that have been imported.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Single transaction
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{TRANSACTION_ID}} with a real transaction_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Updates an existing transaction
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{TRANSACTION_ID}} with a real transaction_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: Deletes an existing transaction
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY. Replace {{TRANSACTION_ID}} with a real transaction_id. Replace {{BUDGET_ID}} with a real budget_id.

endpoints.name: User info
endpoints.notes: Replace {{YOUNEEDABUDGET_API_KEY}} with your YOUNEEDABUDGET API KEY.
